readings.Aries: Everyone in the room can feel you deciding. Make the decision. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Taurus: Your care for the physical world — spaces, objects, bodies — is a form of love. Extend it inward. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.
readings.Gemini: Your flexibility is a gift to others and sometimes a burden to yourself. Draw a line. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.
readings.Cancer: Something you're grieving is not the thing you think you're grieving. Look under it. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Leo: The spotlight is available today. The question is what you want to do in it. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.
readings.Virgo: You have spent considerable energy on a detail that no longer matters. Redirect. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Libra: You are most fully yourself when you are in good company. Today you need your own company. One conversation today matters more than the rest combined.
readings.Scorpio: Something you decided a long time ago is governing today. It may not still be correct. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Sagittarius: Your faith that things will work out is usually warranted. Today, pair it with a concrete step. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Capricorn: You have given the work everything. The work has given back. Notice what it hasn't given. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Aquarius: There is someone who would surprise you if you let them. You haven't let them. Let them. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Pisces: The boundary between you and other people is more permeable than average. This is your gift and your difficulty. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
